latest_external_review.score_note: paperreview.ai does not expose a calibrated numeric score for venue Other
latest_external_review.review_note: The round37 assessment accepted the paper after minor revision requests centered on auditability, heterogeneity checks, and final reproducibility surfacing.

current_revision_state.note: The current manuscript, paper/main_round38.pdf, implements the round37 external review requests after the earlier round30 and round35 analysis/prose revisions, but it has not yet been sent back out for external rereview.

round38_external_feedback_revision.note: See paper/main_round38.pdf for the revision that answers the round37 external review with accession-level motor-family breakdown, gene-symbol sensitivity, stratified detectability modeling, inverse acetylation orientation, and a minimal reproducibility notebook.

round37_successful_rereview.note: See review/round37_review.md, review/round37_scorecard.json, and review/round37_paperreview_response.json for the accepted external review of paper/main_round36.pdf.

round36_external_feedback_revision.note: See paper/main_round36.pdf for the revision that answers the round35 external review with clearer traceability, overlap-model assumptions, accession handling, and detectability-model detail.

round35_successful_rereview.note: See review/round35_review.md, review/round35_scorecard.json, and review/round35_paperreview_response.json for the latest external review of paper/main_round34.pdf.

round34_scientific_prose_revision.note: See paper/main_round34.pdf for the revision that rewrites the abstract and core narrative into a calmer, more authoritative scientific voice.

round33_sentence_level_prose_revision.note: See paper/main_round33.pdf for the broader prose revision that defines PRIDE plainly, refers to deposited spreadsheets instead of vague released tables, and rewrites the main text for clarity and readability.

round32_language_cleanup.note: See paper/main_round32.pdf for the prose cleanup that replaces terms such as proteoform regimes, public top-down record, and detectability-aware follow-up with more natural biology language.

round28_jpr_editorial_pass.note: See paper/main_round28.pdf and submission/JPR_20_PAPER_STYLE_MAP.md for the biology-first, JPR-facing revision made after the round27 external acceptance.

round29_abstract_rewrite.note: See paper/main_round29.pdf for the subsequent abstract rewrite based on JPR abstract patterns, with fewer metrics in the abstract and smoother biological framing.

round31_external_feedback_revision.note: See paper/main_round31.pdf, results/occupancy_detectability_model.csv, results/misidentification_sensitivity.csv, and results/canonicalization_examples.csv for the revision that directly implements the round30 external reviewer requests.

round21_submission_blocked.note: See review/round21_submission_blocked.md for the repeated submission attempts and the external-service error.

round26_submission_blocked.note: See review/round26_submission_blocked.md for the failed immediate retry and short-cooldown retry on the current manuscript.

round27_successful_rereview.note: See review/round27_review.md, review/round27_scorecard.json, and review/round27_paperreview_response.json for the successful acceptance review of paper/main_round26.pdf.

round30_successful_rereview.note: See review/round30_review.md, review/round30_scorecard.json, and review/round30_paperreview_response.json for the earlier external review of paper/main_round29.pdf.

last_calibrated_internal_review.verdict: Accept for a reproducible re-analysis or data-note venue
